# forgespec-mcp

> MCP Server for Spec-Driven Development (SDD) — provides typed contract validation, SQLite-backed task board management, and advisory file locking to coordinate work across multiple AI agents. Works with any MCP-compatible client: Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenClaw, and more.

## Quick Start

- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/forgespec-mcp): Install via `npx -y forgespec-mcp` or `npm install -g forgespec-mcp`
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp): Source code, issues, and contributions

## Core Concepts

- [SDD Pipeline](#sdd-pipeline): 9-phase development lifecycle (init, explore, propose, spec, design, tasks, apply, verify, archive) with confidence thresholds and enforced phase transitions
- [Task Board](#task-board): SQLite-backed task management with dependency tracking, auto-unblocking, priority levels (p0-p3), and status workflow (backlog, ready, in_progress, in_review, done, blocked)
- [File Reservation](#file-reservation): Advisory file locking with TTL-based expiration and glob pattern matching to prevent multi-agent write conflicts

## Tools (19 total)

### SDD Contract Tools

- `sdd_validate`: Validate an SDD contract against the phase schema with confidence checks and allowed transitions
- `sdd_save`: Validate and persist a contract to SQLite with phase tracking
- `sdd_get`: Retrieve a single contract by ID
- `sdd_list`: List contracts with optional project and phase filters
- `sdd_history`: Get phase transition history for a project
- `sdd_phases`: Get all phases with transitions and confidence thresholds

### Task Board Tools

- `tb_create_board`: Create a new task board for a project
- `tb_add_task`: Add a task with priority, spec ref, acceptance criteria, and dependencies
- `tb_status`: Get board status with tasks grouped by status
- `tb_claim`: Claim a task (checks dependencies, auto-moves to in_progress)
- `tb_update`: Update task status (auto-unblocks dependents on completion)
- `tb_unblocked`: List tasks ready to work on (no unresolved dependencies)
- `tb_get`: Get full task details by ID
- `tb_delete_task`: Delete a task (backlog/done only), cleans up dependencies
- `tb_add_notes`: Append timestamped notes to a task
- `tb_list`: List all boards (optionally filtered by project)

### File Reservation Tools

- `file_reserve`: Reserve files or glob patterns with TTL (default 15 min)
- `file_check`: Check for conflicts on file patterns
- `file_release`: Release reservations (specific patterns or all for an agent)

## Configuration

- [Claude Code setup](https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp#configuration): `claude mcp add forgespec --transport stdio -- npx -y forgespec-mcp`
- [Codex CLI setup](https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp#configuration): Add to `~/.codex/config.toml`
- [Gemini CLI setup](https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp#configuration): Add to `settings.json`

## Environment Variables

- `FORGESPEC_DIR` (default `~/.forgespec`): Database directory
- `FORGESPEC_DB` (default `~/.forgespec/forgespec.db`): Full database path

## Optional

- [Development guide](https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp#development): Clone, install, dev/test/build commands
- [License](https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp/blob/master/LICENSE): MIT
